examples: In the east there is the slightest glimmer of light.
Despite an occasional glimmer of hope, this campaign has not produced any results.
How glad he was when at last he caught the glimmer of a light!
Now, in the jungle gloom of my Siem Reap hotel room, a glimmer of understanding grew.
Bur despite the risks and the often limited means, Nzooh says there's a glimmer of hope.
